name: detected_at
description: When the listener emitted the signal

name: processed_at
description: When the Cloud Function processed the message

name: mean_price
description: Mean price across the rolling window

name: std_dev
description: Population standard deviation of window prices

name: window_trade_count
description: Number of trades in the time window at signal time

name: window_span_secs
description: Actual time span of the rolling window in seconds
